title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Ms Hilary French
body: "The Secretary of State does not make these decisions themselves. They are made by a senior official on the recommendation of an independent panel.  Teacher’s name: Ms Hilary French  Teacher reference number: 7760082  Teacher’s date of birth: 23 December 1955  Location Teacher worked: Newcastle, North East England  Date of professional conduct panel: 7 March 2025  Outcome type: Prohibition order  Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of Ms Hilary French formerly employed in Newcastle, North East England. "
